turns.name: WILLIAM REHNQUIST
turns.text: The opinion of the Court in No. 89-1793 United States against Gaubert will be announced by Justice White and the opinion of the Court in No. 89-839 Arizona against Fulminante will be announced contra punitively by Justice White and me.

turns.name: BYRON WHITE
turns.text: In the Gauber case, which is here from the Fifth Circuit, we reverse the judgment of the Court of Appeals. Justice Scalia has filed an opinion concurring in part and concurring in the judgment.
